content: Headlines focusing on 'Efficiency' currently underperform by 12% compared to those focusing on 'Control' in the current A/B tests.
Optimized the primary signup CTA from 'Get Started' to 'Claim Your OS', resulting in a 4.5% lift in initial conversion rate.
The average reading age for the target decision-maker is 8th grade, regardless of their executive job title.
Long-form sales letters are yielding higher quality leads for the enterprise tier, whereas short-burst copy wins for SMBs.
